subject: How to waste a year of America’s time
body:
Americans "want a Congress that delivers results for the people, opening up opportunity and lifting up their lives. When our new members take..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fda2877315&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • September 25, 2019
---
| | |
# **How to waste a year of America’s time**

**Americans “want a Congress** that delivers results for the people, opening up opportunity and lifting up their lives. When our new members take the oath, our Congress will be refreshed, and our democracy will be strengthened by the optimism, idealism and patriotism of this transformative freshman class.”

**That was newly elected** House Speaker Nancy Pelosi on January 3, during the opening session of the 116th Congress. Whether she meant those words at the time is now irrelevant, as the actions of her party this year have betrayed any such vision of a real legislative agenda for working Americans.

**Yesterday,** Congressional Democrats gave yet another snapshot of how they spend their days now. After months of pressure, Speaker Pelosi caved to the far-left base (sorry, “transformative freshman class”) that she has been unable to appease, announcing that she is launching official impeachment inquiries into President Trump. Although Democrats have been hinting at impeachment as a political weapon for two years, the latest excuse they give comes as a response to hyped-up reports of a supposed “quid pro quo” offered to President Zelensky of Ukraine.

**Slight problem:** It turns out the story was completely false. The transcript released by the White House today proves that Democrats simply made up their claims of a “quid pro quo” between President Trump and President Zelensky.

**Here we go again.**

**Democrats in Congress **devote all their time and energy to rumors and innuendo rather than governing. It doesn’t matter if none of it turns out to be true—by then, their media surrogates have spread the lie far and wide. In the process, Speaker Pelosi’s ranks have squandered nearly a year’s worth of time on a single failed agenda item: endless investigations and obstruction. Yesterday’s antics explain why Americans are fed up with Washington and why Congress’ approval numbers sit at an abysmal 18 percent.

**Imagine** all that could have been accomplished had Democrats devoted this year to issues that actually matter to middle-class Americans, [White House Press Secretary Stephanie Grisham](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=42593daa9e&e=3ee4985eea) said in a statement:
| | _Americans deserve elected officials who focus on key issues to improve the lives of families, strengthen our communities, grow our economy, and keep our country safe. In President Donald J. Trump they have someone who has not only focused on those goals, but delivered results.

In a far departure from all of the work and results of this President, House Democrats have destroyed any chances of legislative progress for the people of this country by continuing to focus all their energy on partisan political attacks. Their attacks on the President and his agenda are not only partisan and pathetic, they are in dereliction of their Constitutional duty.

The Trump Administration will continue to be vigorous in laying out the facts and standing up for the many forgotten men and women who elected him. _ |
---|---|---

**The window** for Democrats to do anything of substance this year is closing fast. When Nancy Pelosi spoke about a “new dawn” while accepting the gavel as Speaker earlier this year, she gave the impression that Congress would finally function differently under her watch.

**It doesn’t.** And no one’s holding their breath that her party will start putting the American people before their political ambitions.

[Must read: “The Impeachment Farce Is A Slap In The Face To American Voters”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6a1f32fb8e&e=3ee4985eea)

**NOTHING TO SEE HERE:** [“Democrats Wrote to Ukraine in May 2018, Demanding It Investigate Trump”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=aadc674005&e=3ee4985eea)
|
---
|
## **NEW: President Trump secures trade agreement with Japan**

**While Democrats** work overtime on obstruction, President Trump is delivering results for workers across the country. In New York today, the President signed a document with Japan’s Prime Minister Shinzo Abe that outlines major steps toward a new trade deal between our countries.

**“Under the market access agreement** that we’re announcing today, Japan will open new markets to approximately $7 billion in American agricultural products. Japanese tariffs will now be significantly lower, or eliminated entirely, for U.S. beef, pork, wheat, cheese, corn, wine, and so much more,” President Trump explained. “This is a huge victory for America’s farmers, ranchers, and growers. And that’s very important to me.”

**The second part** of the deal secures robust commitments on $40 _billion_ worth of digital trade for both our economies, expanding commerce for cutting-edge products and services.

**This is what working hard** for the American people looks like.

[Read: President Trump secures major trade agreements with Japan. ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=42e924d5a7&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|

---
|
---

| **President Donald J. Trump participates in a trade agreement signing ceremony with Japan Prime Minister Shinzo Abe at the InterContinental New York Barclay** | September 25, 2019
---

name: Steve Chabot
subject: A Very Dangerous Situation
body:
Trump is irresponsible, rash and stumbling... are his critics right? No Images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jdjjkiyk-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdjjkiyk-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdjjkiyk-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [A Very Dangerous Situation](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdjjkiyk-kujkulhluu-j/)
The recent Iranian missile attack on Saudi Arabia's largest oil facility is a major escalation in danger on the world scene. President Trump's critics, stretching back to before the 2016 election, claimed when such an event occurs, Trump would be rash and irresponsible. In this week's blog, I write how I think the President is handling this latest act of aggression. Were his critics right? [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdjjkiyk-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdjjkiyk-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [The Fake Impeachment](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdjjkiyk-kujkulhluu-d/)
The Democrat base hates President Trump, and to satisfy their unruly base, the Dems are putting on an act, **a fake impeachment!** Read my blog this week and I'll explain this latest desperate attempt to stop the President. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdjjkiyk-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdjjkiyk-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [A Debate Worth Watching? Probably Not...](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdjjkiyk-kujkulhluu-u/)
The Democrats are gearing up for another lengthy presidential debate. In this week's blog, I save you the trouble of having to watch and offer up a better alternative! [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdjjkiyk-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdjjkiyk-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [What's The Press Got Against Melania Trump?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdjjkiyk-kujkulhluu-n/)
The First Lady's treatment by the mainstream press is, in my humble opinion, shameful. In this weeks' blog post, I explain how First Lady Melania Trump has been belittled, criticized, undermined and simply ignored! [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdjjkiyk-kujkulhluu-p/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdjjkiyk-kujkulhluu-x/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdjjkiyk-kujkulhluu-m/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdjjkiyk-kujkulhluu-c/) | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdjjkiyk-kujkulhluu-q/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdjjkiyk-kujkulhluu-a/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdjjkiyk-kujkulhluu-f/)

name: Andrew Yang
subject: You + me = win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
If we work together, we can win. That’s it. That’s the math. We’ve seen this over the last few weeks. Poll after poll shows that our campaign is on fire in a way that all the experts would have laughed at just a few months ago.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=627%2E377263%2EWs9RSW) Friend --

If we work together, we can win. That’s it. That’s the math.

We’ve seen this over the last few weeks. Poll after poll shows that our campaign is on fire in a way that all the experts would have laughed at just a few months ago.

But now we’ve got a new challenge. Our official third-quarter FEC fundraising deadline is on September 30th and all the campaigns will have to report how much they’ve raised and spent in the last three months.

**I’ve given the team a new goal. So I’m asking you directly, friend. Can you chip in now so we can raise $1,500,000 by the deadline?** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/10935?t=5&akid=627%2E377263%2EWs9RSW)
---
Pundits, reporters, and opponents will be looking to gauge the strength of our campaign. They want to see how we stack up against the candidates with big-dollar donors and legacy email lists.

Now’s our chance to send them a message -- the Yang Gang has what it takes to win.

**Can you rush a donation now and help us close out the quarter strong? We’ve got 5 days to raise $1,500,000 to stay on track.**
[Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/10935?t=7&akid=627%2E377263%2EWs9RSW)
---
Thank you for everything,

-Andrew
**Our end-of-quarter deadline is approaching fast, and after that our fundraising numbers will go public for the world to see. Donate now so we can show everyone how powerful this movement is.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/10935?t=6&akid=627%2E377263%2EWs9RSW)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=627%2E377263%2EWs9RSW) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=627%2E377263%2EWs9RSW) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang

name: Tina Smith
subject: I have a question for you...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
I came to the Senate to get things done for you. But right now in Washington, that's awfully difficult to do. And much of that is because of the President. Do you trust Donald Trump?

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-sept2019?refcode=em190925survey-a&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Team,

I came to the Senate to get things done for you. And it is an honor to have the chance to listen to you, to hear what keeps you up at night, and then get to work to find solutions.

But right now in Washington, that's awfully difficult to do. And much of that is because of the President.

Donald Trump has promised that people with pre-existing conditions would be protected by their health insurance -- yet the Trump administration continues to launch attacks that would specifically eliminate those very protections.

Trump vowed his tax bill would prioritize working people over corporations -- but instead the Republican Tax Scam gave millions more dollars to corporations and Trump's billionaire friends.

Trump campaigned on the promise of draining the swamp -- yet we've seen him nominate and appoint countless individuals with records of siding with special interests, instead of standing up for you.

We've heard Trump's promises and seen his actions. **So I have a question for you: Do you trust Donald Trump?**
| | [YES »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/trump-survey?source=em190925survey-a&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
| | [NO »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/trump-survey?source=em190925survey-a&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---

It's hard to believe Trump's words when the facts contradict his promises. From hand-picking right-wing federal judges to dismantling our health care, he's making promises all while pushing a corrupt agenda.

Thanks for speaking up,

Tina
**U.S. Senator Tina Smith is running for re-election in 2020 in a race _NBC News_ has already labeled a "race to watch" with Donald Trump targeting Minnesota for victory. Make sure she has the resources to fight back.** [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-sept2019?refcode=em190925survey-a-biobox&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto")
---

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](). name: Cory Booker
subject: We need to raise $41,232.25 by midnight to keep us on track
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Team, [**In a moment, I 'm going to ask you to make a contribution to my campaign.**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-q3eoq?refcode=em_fr_20190925_CB_20190925-fr-CB-progress-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Here's why -- when we launched our $1.7 million goal, some folks might have mistaken this critical initiative for an end-of-quarter fundraising stunt. I can assure you, it isn't. We made a decision to give everyone a real, under-the-hood look into our campaign's financial situation -- a level of transparency unprecedented in presidential politics. We made that choice because I believe with everything I've got that this team has the ability to come together to meet big challenges. And so far, people like you have been stepping up -- we've already raised $1 million toward the $1.7 million goal. [**After crunching the numbers today, my team told me we need to raise $41,232.25 by midnight tonight to stay on track -- can you help?**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-q3eoq?refcode=em_fr_20190925_CB_20190925-fr-CB-progress-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") This challenge, as an underdog in this race, is nothing new for me. I've spent my entire career building unlikely coalitions to take on big problems and help make impossible things possible -- it's the foundation of why I'm running for president. It's not an exaggeration to say that this is our most critical FEC deadline yet, team. And reaching our ambitious goal will take each of us doing our part. [**So please, if you want to make sure my voice is part of this race for the long haul, help us stay on track tonight and make a donation right now.**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-q3eoq?refcode=em_fr_20190925_CB_20190925-fr-CB-progress-actives_actives_l3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Thanks,
Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-q3eoq?refcode=em_fr_20190925_CB_20190925-fr-CB-progress-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0baf/5fca0d19/746dbc53/291f25cb/3782731437/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0baf/5fca0d19/746dbc53/291f25ca/3782731437/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0baf/5fca0d19/746dbc53/291f25c9/3782731437/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0baf/5fca0d19/746dbc53/291f25c8/3782731437/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0baf/5fca0d19/746dbc53/291f25d7/3782731437/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0baf/5fca0d19/746dbc53/291f25cb/3782731437/VEsHBQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: Dean Browning for Congress
subject: Rep. Susan Wild Supports Trump Impeachment
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BROWNING FOR CONGRESS
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Dear Patriot,
Representative Susan Wild wants to impeach President Donald J. Trump based off the latest partisan witch hunt, this one centered around Ukraine.
This is typical Liberal Elitism. Joe Biden used his power as Vice-President to protect his son and ensure Hunter Biden raked in $50,000 per month from shady dealings with a Ukrainian Company, but the liberal wants to come after our President?
We can not let this happen. We must support our President and our Country. Say "NO" to impeachment and help me take on Susan Wild by donating just $5 or $10 today.
---
| | | [Click here to Donate!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014ZmNH6h2WzRWFe9bgMSSJRyHsD-tgLY1WUvXx4kuhMps_rimRPFCLowi9CjnrvEbM-kA3JJ0pj56niRvjUC3cfhCAPPWoBNBm3pBQahHTu3JCChhf9TrJbO8wjw11_4l5_xSedHh5vbOKKqFZOIgwxxCjcLcEFyRAbTuWB2EiK6he38SkHtJHA==&c=08ZSoTiaQBPmkuOq6en9YLPWyWaYmUtIlRJRp5UU5m4E4R798uZRQg==&ch=RF-KBvJQpTM8nDRL-aA4K8kG84v1phuJEjbRZjc6A4Re7WNdppLFUg==)
---
| DO NOT FORGET! The campaign finance filing deadline is just days away, and I need all the help I can get to show Rep. Susan Wild that we plan to bring Conservative values back to the 7th Congressional District.
Please donate TODAY before the deadline. All pledges, big and small, go a long way in helping to stop this unjust impeachment of President Trump and defeat Susan Wild in November 2020.

name: Brandon Beach
subject: on the road
body:
Peter,

I have been busy hitting the campaign trail and meeting supporters all across the district and I am hearing the same thing from everyone – folks want someone who will win and someone who will deliver real solutions to the problems we face.

That’s why I’m in this race.

I am writing today to ask an important question. Can make a donation to my campaign? Whatever you are able to give would be appreciated and go towards advancing the bold solutions you’ve been hearing from me day in and day out. Donate today: www.beachforcongress.com/donate.

Brandon

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you are no longer interested you can unsubscribe instantly:
https://brandonbeach.cmail20.com/t/r-u-jdyhtux-udyuidthb-r/

body:
Peter,
There are four days until the end of the first quarter since I've been in the Presidential race. I ask you to **contribute now** to ensure that we meet our goal **for funding the TV ads that we need for next quarter**.
**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10294192/103280107/1036341175?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MGU2Njk1Yy03M2UwLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qGdWrbIuEcgvl874BE-Ij9AXIWZigM9N-gIsqwSV0qg=&refcode=em092619p1)**
We've raised well, including to ensure we could travel to 235 event/press engagements in Iowa to identify those who will become one of the 1800 precinct captains needed for the caucus on February 3rd. For October, we are headed to New Hampshire where almost all the primary voters have not yet made up their mind, underscored by only 5 percent of elected officials, including town party chairs, have endorsed a candidate. name: =?utf-8?Q?Ian=20Todd?=
subject: A historic week: St. Cloud stands together; Congressional kickoff on Friday
body:
Join Ian on Friday to help launch his congressional campaign! | | | |
---
| | |
# This Friday: Join Ian for His
Campaign Kickoff
---
|
---
|
---
| Last November, we broke records and brought our district closer to victory than we've been in six years. I've been absolutely blown away by the support you have all given me -- and continue to give. **When I ran in 2018, I did so because I believed I could make a positive change in the world. This time, I'm running because _all of you_ believe I can make that change.

Join me tomorrow – Friday, Sept. 27 at 6 p.m. – when I officially launch my campaign for U.S. Congress at the Monticello Community Center.**

Running for Congress is hardly what I expected to be doing with my life after active duty service in the Air Force. I am, by no means, a typical candidate. But like you: I am a typical American.

I've lived through financial hardship. I had parents that struggled to make ends meet while raising me. And I understand what living paycheck to paycheck really feels like.

That's exactly why I'm running. I understand the struggle so many families are going through, and I will fight for you.

There is no shortage of crises facing our country. On top of all the issues facing families who are having a hard time paying their monthly bills, we are now dealing with a president that is constantly undermining the norms of our democracy. Earlier this week, Speaker Nancy Pelosi announced that the House of Representatives will, officially, begin an impeachment inquiry.

It's about time.

Impeaching a president isn’t something I take lightly. But it is of the utmost importance that we follow the U.S. Constitution. One of the bedrocks of our democracy is that no one is above the law. Congress is a co-equal branch of government and has a constitutional responsibility to conduct oversight and act as a check on the power of the president. We cannot set the precedent that we don’t hold our leaders accountable.

Join me tomorrow evening at the Monticello Community Center. Together, we can build a movement to fight for working families in Minnesota and throughout the United States.

**_Friday, Sept. 27_**

**What** : Official campaign kickoff (food provided)
**Where** : Monticello Community Center - Warehouse Room; 505 Walnut St.; Monticello
**When** : 6 p.m., Friday, Sept. 27
**Details** : [RSVP on Facebook](https://IanToddforcongress.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0824156d3c3076099692cab73&id=bf3121d1eb&e=c56804a14d) (RSVP requested, but not required)

* * *
---
| |
# Making History in St. Cloud
---
| |
---
| | I want to thank all the amazing people that made St. Cloud's first ever Pride Parade a success. Our LGBTQ+ community, and all their allies, are doing a tremendous job to make sure everyone living in St. Cloud is embraced as a valued member of our community. This city has proven itself to be vibrant, diverse and full of love and joy. I was proud to attend three different events over the last week, and I will continue to fight on behalf of all our people to ensure that no one is forced to feel the pain of facing discrimination.

It is a shame that the forum on dismantling hate crimes in St. Cloud was postponed due to a protest from a group that _promotes_ hate crimes, causing a public safety concern. But, together, we made sure hate did not succeed. I was thrilled to join roughly 300 people in the Pride and Peace Walk.

I know there are those that feel distrust and racism haunts St. Cloud. But always remember: There are far more people that love their neighbors than hate them.

[Together, we can fight for a better future for working families in Minnesota and throughout the United States. Help give our campaign kickoff a boost with a modest donation!](https://IanToddforcongress.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0824156d3c3076099692cab73&id=01fae2812b&e=c56804a14d)

---
| | [](https://IanToddforcongress.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0824156d3c3076099692cab73&id=8a796fd989&e=c56804a14d)
---
| | |
---
| _Copyright © 2019 Ian Todd for Congress, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you signed up for email updates either online or at one of our events.

**Our mailing address is:**
Ian Todd for Congress1974 Peach Dr NESauk Rapids, MN 56379-4579
[Add us to your address book](https://IanToddforcongress.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=0824156d3c3076099692cab73&id=28710cd7a6)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://IanToddforcongress.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=0824156d3c3076099692cab73&id=28710cd7a6&e=c56804a14d) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://IanToddforcongress.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=0824156d3c3076099692cab73&id=28710cd7a6&e=c56804a14d&c=e93a35c655).

---

What do you do when your frontrunner is a sleepy 76-year-old man embroiled in a MASSIVE corruption scandal?

A Ukrainian energy company knew that Joe Biden was for sale, so they gave his son $50,000 a MONTH to sit on their board despite having no previous, relevant experience in the energy sector. Nancy Pelosi wants you to believe that was President Trump's fault.

>
We're just four days away from this important FEC fundraising deadline. When the stakes are this high, it's common for a candidate to spend their time at exclusive fundraising events with wealthy donors who write big checks.

But that's not Elizabeth's style. Instead, she'd rather spend time chatting with people like you and talking with them about the issues that you care about.

There won't be any big-name entertainers or fancy appetizers, and that's perfectly fine with her, because she's running the campaign she wants to run -- a campaign powered by a grassroots movement, not the wealthy and well-connected.

**[Elizabeth wants to personally thank supporters who step up before our big deadline. Can she count on you?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529935/45c30650/135aa38ba/668d9e37/2463355801/VEsEAA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LTIwMTlxM2VvcSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1KMUFGX0VPUV9ET0NfUF8yMDE5MDkyNl9WMVMxX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-2019q3eoq?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMJ1AF_EOQ_DOC_P_20190926_V1S1_P")**

(And when you do, keep an eye on your phone tonight -- if you get a call from an unknown number, it might just be her!)

Thank you for being a part of this,

Team Warren

[**DONATE NOW**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529935/45c30650/135aa38ba/668d9e37/2463355801/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LTIwMTlxM2VvcSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1KMUFGX0VPUV9ET0NfUF8yMDE5MDkyNl9WMVMxX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-2019q3eoq?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMJ1AF_EOQ_DOC_P_20190926_V1S1_P")

name: Gov. Mike Huckabee
subject: The political storm is brewing
body:
| | Peter, President Trump made history at the United Nations this week and did what few presidents before him have dared to do. He called for the protection of religious freedom across the world. Trump must have made the separation of church and state activists squirm when he stated, “our rights do not come from government, they come from God.” **Yet, while the President was advancing religious freedom, other world leaders were fueling the hysteria on climate change, and on Capitol Hill, a political storm was brewing.** House Speaker Nancy Pelosi officially announced the Democratic Party would proceed with a formal impeachment inquiry into the President. This is nothing short of a political circus. **[Christians across the nation need to realize that what’s at stake in 2020 is the danger of electing leaders who fail to defend religious freedom and strip away the most basic human right](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p190926apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190926apl01nd&n=1).** **Look no further than the Pelosi supported, and House championed, Equality Act that would create a government that...**
* Prioritizes sexual orientation and gender politics over religious freedom.
* Forces faith-based hospitals and medical professionals to participate and assist in abortions.
* Mandates taxpayers fund abortions even up until the moment of birth.
* Closes foster care and adoption agencies who believe children deserve both a mother and a father instead of homosexual partners.
* Strips parents of their rights to prevent their minor child from taking cross-sex changing hormones.
* Requires business owners to violate their religious consequence and affirm LGBTQ sexual behavior or else close down their business.

**America may be a leader in the world for religious freedom today, but will we be tomorrow?** **[This is why I’m asking for your partnership to help us reach non-voting Christians before 2020](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p190926apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190926apl01nd&n=2).** Elections have consequences. If Christians do not vote in 2020, it’s almost guaranteed the loss of religious freedom will become a reality in America. At least 25 million registered Christians are likely to sit on the sidelines unless we motivate and equip them to vote. **I’ve shared with you before, My Faith Votes has a plan using cutting edge technology, ground game door-to-door canvassing, and community mobilization at churches and on Christian college campuses - to ensure Christians turn out at the polls.** The political left is aggressively fundraising and fighting for their values - it’s evident they sure are not waiting until 2020. It’s essential people of faith invest in our efforts today to wake up defenders of biblical values. **[Please donate today to protect your right to freely live out your faith, raise your children according to your convictions, and operate your business without violating your faith](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p190926apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190926apl01nd&n=3).** What we accomplish together now, will directly impact voter turnout and the elections in 2020. There is no time to waste and nothing more precious than our religious freedom. [](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p190926apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190926apl01nd&n=4) **United. We Stand.**

Gov. Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190926apl01nd&n=5)
---
* * *
©2019 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190926apl01nd&n=6).
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sQ5cX_bEu8cPkWYJ2Mr5-wZKXu3dY5XWtaPM4h3adih&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190926apl01nd&n=7) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=pQzeq3ow3I_GdDaQAo3jThGOsBJSnRMSTnYdqF5RrFw9RIPs8jarlLWzFCwppO5s&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190926apl01nd&n=8) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y-k8vVr8cJ4CYXZKhF1mHHVF_9enIccjId0FBdBJJ7Kr&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190926apl01nd&n=9)

name: Will Washington
subject: Let me introduce myself
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/2Tgfnuk_Rs-CUhrd4DvsIWPCZBImz2PX84OU3hJIPvk=/tjr3XRY_yeeoTIj3Px98gYJfauSZtSkJgjjhfSn6QBo=?refcode=20190926eoq2)
---
Nice to meet you, team -- I'm Will, Sri's Campaign Manager. I have to admit, I jumped on this race at a crazy time: Pete Olson just announced his retirement, the campaign has been getting a ton of positive press and grassroots interest, AND we have a major End of Quarter fundraising deadline coming up on Monday at midnight. Even still, I was thrilled to take this job and join Team Sri because I know **Sri has what it takes to win this thing and then go fight for Texas families in Washington!** **Right now, I need your help to hit this deadline and maybe even impress my new boss by blowing past our fundraising goal!** Here's the simple truth: Our fundraising numbers will be made public, and the only way to prove to pundits, the media, and our opponents that we're serious (and out to win!) is to post stellar numbers. name: Dave Hoffman
subject: This isn't optional, it's critical
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Mackler for U
body:
I need you to know--hitting these goals isn't optional. It's not suggested. It's critical.
|
---
[ ](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa221/18d6a294/4cf89385/26d6421f/1413258149/VEsH/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://www.jamesmackler.com/")

| | | | **FEC DEADLINE: 4 DAYS**
This is our first challenge since Trump's hand-picked candidate finally announced he's running against James. | | | [CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa221/18d6a294/4cf89385/26d6421c/1413258149/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUxOTA5MjYiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibmQifQ%3D%3D/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme190926?refcode=jme190926_nd&recurring=true")
---
We have a lot of ground to cover before the end of the month if we want to hit our FEC goal.
_**FEC GOAL**_ | **$50,000**
---|---
_**AMOUNT RAISED**_ | **$35,690**
_**LEFT TO RAISE**_ | **$14,310**
I need you to know--hitting these goals isn't optional. It's not suggested. _It 's critical._
James isn't taking any corporate PAC money, so he's counting on you to make sure we're prepared for whatever comes our way. [_**Contribute $3 today.**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa221/18d6a294/4cf89385/26d6421c/1413258149/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUxOTA5MjYiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibmQifQ%3D%3D/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme190926?refcode=jme190926_nd&recurring=true")
We need a leader like James in the Senate--not an anti-choice Trump Administration official. But that won't happen if we miss our goals. Don't wait until it's too late: [_**Give what you can today.**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa221/18d6a294/4cf89385/26d6421c/1413258149/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUxOTA5MjYiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibmQifQ%3D%3D/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme190926?refcode=jme190926_nd&recurring=true")
Thank you,
Dave Hoffman
Campaign Manager

name: Cory Booker
subject: We missed our goal, team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| **Team, we missed our $155,000 goal yesterday by $13,084.05.** We must make each and every day count if we want to reach $1.7 million by September 30th. To do that, my team set daily goals that we must hit to stay on track. That means we have to raise $118,084.05 today to catch up to where we need to be. **Will you chip in to help us reach the $118,084.05 we need to raise TODAY to get back on track to raise $1.7 million by the end of the month?** | If you've saved your payment information with
ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
---
| | | [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-q3eoq?refcode=em_fr_20190926_CB_20190926-fr-CB-fallshort1-actives_actives_express5&amount=5&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,20.20,50,100")

---

---

This isn't an end-of-quarter stunt or an attempt to spin the press. When we realized we were going to come up short of the resources necessary to grow, I knew we had a choice. So here's what's going on -- no BS: Hitting $1.7 million will determine if our campaign has a future in this race or not.
I know this is no easy task -- some have called it a herculean challenge. But our campaign has seen real momentum since we launched this goal over the weekend, and coming up short is not an option.
**[So please, team, help us reach our $118,084.05 goal for today by 11:59 p.m. tonight to keep us on track.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-q3eoq?refcode=em_fr_20190926_CB_20190926-fr-CB-fallshort1-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
I know I can count on you, friend.
Cory
[](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-q3eoq?refcode=em_fr_20190926_CB_20190926-fr-CB-fallshort1-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0bae/5fca0d19/77908677/291f2250/2393869740/VEsHBQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0bae/5fca0d19/77908677/291f225f/2393869740/VEsHBA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0bae/5fca0d19/77908677/291f225e/2393869740/VEsHBw/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0bae/5fca0d19/77908677/291f225d/2393869740/VEsHBg/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0bae/5fca0d19/77908677/291f2251/2393869740/VEsHAQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: Marjan
subject: Flash Sale!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019
body:
Check out our new online store right now for shirts, coffee mugs, hats and more!
|
---

| | Peter, I can't tell you the number of times I've been in the grocery store, getting an oil change or grabbing a sandwich in my Beshear/Coleman shirt when someone grabs me and says, "I can't wait to vote for Andy AND where can I get one of those shirts?!?"

I always direct them to our **[new online store](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a5d/ad6dc73/1410f6c6/db78f64/929408195/VEsH/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://store.andybeshear.com/")**. Check it out right now for shirts, coffee mugs, hats and more. And for the next 48 hours we have a PROMO CODE (use "GoAndyGo!" at checkout) for 15% off all items as a way to thank you for your support. [**Buy now so you can get your gear before the final few weeks of the election.**](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a5d/ad6dc73/1410f6c6/db78f64/929408195/VEsE/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://store.andybeshear.com/") | [](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a5d/ad6dc73/1410f6c6/db78f64/929408195/VEsF/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://store.andybeshear.com/")

Marjan

| Derek, In November, Manchester votes for Mayor - and Republicans across New Hampshire need to pay attention. Victoria is running to correct Craig's Chaos in Manchester - crime has increased, homelessness is on the rise, addiction rates have skyrocketed. You can see more of Joyce's broken promises [in this video.](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMjUzNjI1OTM4MzkwODE2MTQ4JmM9eDVtNSZlPTE5MjgmYj0yODAwMjkwNDImZD15NXowdTVy.1QjxayYtcprPqVZfjuDSq9T8L8yLny8lgg7RP39E85A) _**Victoria Sullivan is running for Mayor to make Manchester shine once more \- **_[can you chip in $15 to her campaign today?](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMjUzNjI1OTM4MzkwODE2MTQ4JmM9eDVtNSZlPTE5MjgmYj0yODAwMjkwNDQmZD1rOHc5aTlk.r3UUT9yHf8lHR6KN7uWc9tGadKWymu6DqCum0pLI0mQ)
---

name: Amy O'Rourke
subject: Hi!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Beto for America

It’s been a while since I’ve written to you, but I wanted to reach out
because it’s Beto’s birthday. He is in Pennsylvania today, so the kids and
I won’t get to celebrate with him in person. Instead, we’ll join
volunteers and supporters in El Paso to celebrate from afar.

It’s not easy to be apart on yet another anniversary (14 years this past
Tuesday!) and his birthday, but the encouragement we’re getting from all
of you makes it all worthwhile.

Every day I’m struck by all your dedication and enthusiasm. What I have
seen on the ground in Texas, New Hampshire, and Iowa is remarkable. And I
have loved following along via phone calls and social media this past week
as he traveled through Colorado, Ohio, Indiana, Illinois, and
Pennsylvania. There has been so much incredible energy and enthusiasm, and
I know Beto has learned a lot from all of you who have been willing to
share your stories.

Keeping Beto on the road so he can meet as many people as possible and
organizing the largest volunteer team in the country who will mobilize
voters in November 2020 requires a tremendous amount of infrastructure and
money.

Since the campaign has a big goal of raising $750,000 by Monday at
midnight, [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/35292?refcode=ema20190926-57557&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=57557%2E444211%2ECMYoQX ]I’m wondering if you’ll donate today for Beto’s birthday.

Thank you for all you do to keep this campaign going! It’s such an honor
to be part of this with you.

Amy

PS: As a reminder, in four days, we’ll close the books on our
end-of-quarter fundraising.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/35292?refcode=ema20190926-57557&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=57557%2E444211%2ECMYoQX ]Since it’s Beto’s birthday and we have a really big goal (and a lot of
ground to make up), I’m wondering: Can you make a birthday donation today?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/35292?refcode=ema20190926-57557&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=57557%2E444211%2ECMYoQX ]Donate for Beto's Birthday

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-for-america-emails?refcode=em20190926footer&t=1023&refcode2=57557_444211_CMYoQX&akid=57557%2E444211%2ECMYoQX

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=57557%2E444211%2ECMYoQX

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: After Failing on Russia, Democrats Try a New Hoax
body:
"Sequels are rarely better than the original. If we have learned anything over the last six days, as the feeding frenzy over the whistleblower has..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ec4463b030&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **After Failing on Russia, Democrats Try a New Hoax**

“Sequels are rarely better than the original. If we have learned anything over the last six days, as the feeding frenzy over the whistleblower has overtaken official Washington, it is this: Democrats want to impeach President Trump and they do not care if the facts support their cause,” Matt Mackowiak writes for _The Washington Times_.

“After more than two years of Democrats’ hyperventilating, Mr. Trump was cleared of collusion and conspiracy. Democrats and their media allies overhyped their claims and won Pulitzer Prizes along the way. But they failed in their objective, and soon we will learn more about the origins of the Russia collusion hoax and FISA warrant abuses.”

“Instead of overhyping this story, Democrats should have been more careful and measured. But they could not help themselves.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=823e876eb1&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Once again, the rhetoric from House Intelligence Committee Chairman Adam Schiff, D-Calif., has been discredited by facts. With the release of the rough transcript of the July 25 call between Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky and President Trump, Schiff's prediction that it would show Trump had ‘crossed the Rubicon’ has failed to materialize,” former Rep. Jason Chaffetz (R-UT) writes in [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e0683e819c&e=3ee4985eea). “There was no quid pro quo – no ‘browbeating’ of a foreign leader. Just two heads of state talking about Ukraine's role in 2016 U.S. election interference and discussing getting to the bottom of the corruption that has spilled over between the two countries. With his history of deliberately distorting the truth, secretly disclosing classified information, and openly converting the House Intelligence Committee into a partisan opposition research operation, Schiff has repeatedly proven he cannot be trusted.”
---
|
---
| The Trump Administration “agreed on Wednesday to stay in a United Nations body that has regulated international mail service for more than a century after delegates agreed during emergency talks to change the way postal fees are structured,” Nick Cumming-Bruce reports for [_The New York Times_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5b50214bad&e=3ee4985eea). The deal “will allow the United States to start setting its own postal fees in July and allow other countries that receive more than 75,000 metric tons of mail a year to start phasing in higher rates in January 2021.” White House Director of Trade and Manufacturing Policy Peter Navarro called the decision a “huge victory for millions of American workers and businesses,” saving the U.S. between $300 million and $500 million a year.
---
|
---
| “In the media’s efforts to tie President Donald Trump with its latest conspiracy theory, CNN skipped an entire section of the released and unredacted transcript of a phone call to charge Trump with requesting a favor he never asked for,” Tristan Justice reports for [_The Federalist_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4678ba96ef&e=3ee4985eea). The transcript that CNN read on air wrongly connected the word “favor” with President Trump “asking the Ukrainian leader to look into former vice president Joe Biden and his son Hunter’s questionable business dealings with a Ukrainian energy company”—a full _540 words later._
---
|
---
| “The United States and Japan outlined initial details of a trade deal Wednesday as they ... iron out a broader agreement,” Jacob Pramuk reports for [CNBC](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5746ffe432&e=3ee4985eea). “The first stage of the accord will open markets up to about $7 billion in U.S. agricultural products, President Donald Trump said at a signing ceremony with Japanese Prime Minister Shinzo Abe at the United Nations. Japan will also reduce tariffs on products such as beef and pork, and eliminate tariffs on goods such as almonds, blueberries and broccoli.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2d612fb520&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bfad25b16f&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=36e0f1bc7f)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

subject: Get to Know Jim Baird: Combat Veteran & Congressman
body:
We're now less than three weeks away from the 2019 Team Holcomb Fall Dinner. On October 14, we're excited to host this special event where we'll... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/get-to-know-jim-baird-combat-veteran-congressman?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a2411592c4&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **Get to Know Hoosier Jim Baird:**
Congressman, Combat Vet & Fall Dinner Special Guest We're now less than three weeks away from the [2019 Team Holcomb Fall Dinner](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=439bba06a9&e=1acd9bb3d6). On October 14, we're excited to host this special event where we'll honor our veterans, including our speakers -- three very brave combat vets who have made a lasting sacrifice for our nation.

We've introduced you via email over the last two weeks to Congressmen and combat veterans Dan Crenshaw and Brian Mast. And now we want to tell you more about our third speaker -- someone already very familiar to Hoosiers, Indiana's own Congressman Jim Baird.

**Congressman Baird is a decorated Vietnam War veteran. During a two-and-a-half-month incursion into Laos, the Vietnamese Army hit our soldiers hard with a total of 23 convoy ambushes. Baird fought in two of the deadliest ambushes of the operation, and lost his left arm as a result. **

Congressman Baird received a Bronze Star with V device and two Purple Hearts for his service. But, as you likely know, his service didn't end there. Baird put his skills to work running a home care business and a family farm in his hometown. He also served Hoosiers at the Statehouse, where he helped Indiana balance its budgets. And now he's putting those skills to use in Congress!

**Jim Baird is not only a Hoosier hero, but an American hero as well. We would love for you to join us and to hear from Congressman Jim Baird, as well as Congressmen Dan Crenshaw and Brian Mast, at this year's [Team Holcomb Fall Dinner on October 14](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3f1f16b2da&e=1acd9bb3d6).

[RSVP now](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=4e5948fc60&e=1acd9bb3d6)[ at this link](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e468d41d4c&e=1acd9bb3d6)! Tickets are selling quickly, so make sure you don't miss out!**
---
| [Click here to RSVP for the Team Holcomb Fall Dinner!](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=07d46aef40&e=1acd9bb3d6 "Click here to RSVP for the Team Holcomb Fall Dinner!")

name: Susie Lee for Congress
subject: Thank you for your submission
body:
Dear Friend,

Thank you for adding your name to join our campaign team on my run for Congress! I'm thrilled to be running, and I am grateful to have your support and the support of people like you.

I'm glad you're ready to join this movement. Together, we'll build a future we can be proud of starting today.

Yours truly,

Susie Lee

subject: You're Invited

body:

Friend,

body:

GOP is ramping up its fundraising across the board to try and

see if we have what it takes to compete with their deep-pocketed
backers and defend our House majority.

On Monday Democrats will face our toughest test yet with the
Federal Election Commission (FEC) quarterly filing deadline.

We must have an unbeatable grassroots network to fight back
against the GOP. Our numbers will go public at midnight on Monday
so we’ve set a goal of activating 500 grassroots donors by then.
Will you be one of them?
( https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mt-sept19-eoq?refcode=MT_EM_FR_WL_190926_1_2&amount=20.00&recurring=true&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D )

( https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mt-sept19-eoq?refcode=MT_EM_FR_WL_190926_1_2&amount=10.00&recurring=true&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D )

Since our last FEC deadline, the GOP has ramped up its
fundraising and spending in targeted districts, including here in
California. They’re feeling threatened by the progress the
Democratic majority is making, so they’re going to spend BIG to
buy their way back into power.

Competitive House races are already picking up steam around
the country. We must support Dems in these tough races and hold
on to our majority to protect our progress. Chip in right away!
( https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mt-sept19-eoq?refcode=MT_EM_FR_WL_190926_1_2&amount=20&recurring=true&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D )

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mt-sept19-eoq
( https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mt-sept19-eoq?refcode=MT_EM_FR_WL_190926_1_2&amount=20&recurring=true&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D )

Thanks for all you do.

Mike

represents California's 5th district in Congress, where he fights

name: Zoe Lofgren for Congress
subject: step up to protect our House majority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lofgren for Congress
body:
Making sure you got this message from Zoe. She’s in it to win it in 2020, and needs your support before the public FEC fundraising deadline on September 30 to continue helping our California 7. See below and please rush a donation of any size today. https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zl-september19?refcode=ZL_EM_FR_WL_190926_1_1&recurring=auto [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zl-september19?refcode=ZL_EM_FR_WL_190926_1_1&recurring=auto]

Begin Forwarded Message Friends,

As I hope you have heard, a few months ago I announced that I am running for re-election – and right now, I am taking all of the necessary steps to prepare for that race. And a significant part of that preparation is raising the funds that I need to run a real grassroots campaign that takes my message directly to the voters and win again.

If that challenge does not materialize, then the bulk of my campaign funds – as I have always done – will go to support our Democratic House candidates here in California and around the country and to protect (and maybe even expand) our Democratic House Majority next year. Last cycle alone, I contributed over $1.8m directly from my campaign account as part of the effort to flip the House and I also financed buses, lunches, and hotel rooms for volunteers from my district to knock on doors and get out the vote in our Central Valley districts and to fund other GOTV efforts in the five Republican-held seats in Southern California that we flipped. And I hope to continue helping in such a big way next year as we work to protect our California 7 and other hard-won seats we picked up last year.

Your help once more would certainly go a long way to that goal. If you can help, you can give at this personalized link and I'll get updates in real time.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zl-september19?refcode=ZL_EM_FR_WL_190926_1_1&amount=35&recurring=auto [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zl-september19?refcode=ZL_EM_FR_WL_190926_1_1&amount=35&recurring=auto]

Anything you can do at this time would really mean a great deal to me.

I know you get asked to support many worthwhile causes and candidates -- and I am very grateful for your consideration of this request to help me again and for the encouragement you have given me over the years.

Zoe

Sent from my iPad

Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren is a strong fighter for California’s values in Washington. As the Chair of the California Democratic Congressional Delegation she has been on the front lines of expanding and protecting the Democratic Majority. Zoe has dedicated her career to fighting for our diverse communities and needs your help. Click here to donate to Zoe’s campaign → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zlem?refcode=emfooter&amount=10&recurring=auto]
Contributions or gifts to Zoe Lofgren for Congress are not tax deductible.Paid for by Lofgren for Congress

name: Zach Graumann
subject: Friend, let me explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
If we don’t make it onto the debate stage in November, we’re in big trouble.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=756%2E377263%2EOKSBx8) Friend,

**If we don’t make it onto the debate stage in November, we’re in big trouble.**

I hate to be so grim, but it’s the truth. And if we don’t raise enough money and put our message in front of more Americans, then we’re not going to make it onto that stage. We can't let that happen.

The good news is that if we can reach our goal of $1,500,000 by midnight on Monday, then I know we have what it takes to make the stage, seize on this momentum, and win. **Can you chip in now to ensure we make it?**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/11052?t=5&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=756%2E377263%2EOKSBx8)

Thanks for everything you do,
Zach

Our end-of-quarter deadline is approaching fast, and after that our fundraising numbers will go public for the world to see. Donate now so we can show everyone how powerful this movement is.
[DONATE NOW](https://act.yang2020.com/go/11052?t=6&akid=756%2E377263%2EOKSBx8)

But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=756%2E377263%2EOKSBx8) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=756%2E377263%2EOKSBx8) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang

The good news is that if we can reach our goal of $1,500,000 by midnight on Monday, then I know we have what it takes to make the stage, seize on this momentum, and win. name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Mark Kelly needs our help to retake the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter, Former astronaut and Navy fighter pilot Mark Kelly is now tied 42 to 42 with GOP incumbent Senator Martha McSally in the highly watched Arizona Senate race. This seat is _critical_ for Democrats to flip to retake the Senate, and Mark Kelly stands a good chance of doing just that. _The Cook Political Report, Inside Elections_ and _Sabato 's Crystal Ball_ have released their latest Senate race ratings, and they've all placed Martha McSally's Arizona seat firmly in the "Toss-Up" category. With her seat at risk, we know McSally will do anything, including cheating and breaking campaign finance laws, to win \-- because she's already been caught violating campaign finance laws _**multiple times!**_ We're asking voters what they think about this race, and we need 117 more responses before MIDNIGHT: **Who do you support for U.S. Senate?** [Mark Kelly](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd3d/6e9863e8/15173ddf/1db0d7f7/613902849/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/xu0Mei-y") [Martha McSally](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd3d/6e9863e8/15173ddf/1db0d7f7/613902849/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/xu0Mei-y") Thanks for your support, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd3d/6e9863e8/15173ddf/1db0d7f6/613902849/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kellyvmcsally-nd?refcode=WDTO20190926a.ND-b&refcode2=4tJreyPEbdRNLblMlmPn")

name: Ed Markey
subject: Fight for the truth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| |
---
| Team,

Donald Trump violated his oath of office.

By seeking foreign help to smear a political rival and influence our elections, he continues to tear at the fabric of our democracy every day.

And now, with the released "transcript" of Donald Trump's call with Ukrainian President Zelensky, the evidence of Trump's wrongdoing is clear.

And equally disturbing, the "transcript" also shows that Donald Trump is using the Justice Department as a weapon to go after his rival.

All that we have learned shows that Trump committed impeachable offenses.

House Democrats are doing their constitutional duty to impeach Donald Trump, and they need to know that we're standing with them ready to fight for the truth.

_**[Will you add your name next to mine and show you support House Democrats' impeachment to hold Donald Trump accountable?](http://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dcf3/693b8b0a/44bc2d8c/72de68a3/773267676/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/demand-impeachment?source=EM-092619_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=")**_

Thanks,

Ed Markey

name: Jenny Nadicksbernd, Finance Director
subject: what happens on Sept. 30th @ 11:59 p.m.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
This is a key moment in Mark's campaign because it's our chance to show the strength of his grassroots supporters.
|
---
| | | **Goal: $40,000
Deadline: September 30th @ 11:59 p.m.** | [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d0aa/53d9897e/52579c1c/1c8e1650/2198587170/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI0OCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-septeoq?refcode=20190926nd__248__&refcode2=graphic1&amount=5")

Derek, there are times **I wish we didn 't have to talk so much about deadlines.** But Mark has a big end-of-quarter FEC reporting deadline approaching at the end of the month. **This is a key moment in Mark 's campaign because it's our chance to show the strength of his grassroots supporters.**

This FEC reporting deadline is even more important because it's the **FIRST** one since Mark's opponent announced his campaign. Those inside and outside that campaign will be looking at our fundraising numbers as a predictor of Election Day in 2020.

**Will you pitch in toward our $40,000 goal to show that Mark 's got you in his corner?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
**[DONATE $5](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d0aa/53d9897e/52579c1c/1c8e165e/2198587170/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI0OCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-septeoq?express_lane=true&refcode=20190926nd__248__&refcode2=express_lane_1&amount=5")**
**[DONATE $10](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d0aa/53d9897e/52579c1c/1c8e165d/2198587170/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI0OCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-septeoq?express_lane=true&refcode=20190926nd__248__&refcode2=express_lane_2&amount=10")**
**[DONATE $25](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d0aa/53d9897e/52579c1c/1c8e165c/2198587170/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI0OCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-septeoq?express_lane=true&refcode=20190926nd__248__&refcode2=express_lane_3&amount=25")**
**[DONATE $50](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d0aa/53d9897e/52579c1c/1c8e165b/2198587170/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI0OCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-septeoq?express_lane=true&refcode=20190926nd__248__&refcode2=express_lane_4&amount=50")**
**[DONATE $100](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d0aa/53d9897e/52579c1c/1c8e165a/2198587170/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI0OCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-septeoq?express_lane=true&refcode=20190926nd__248__&refcode2=express_lane_5&amount=100")**
**[CHOOSE AN AMOUNT](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d0aa/53d9897e/52579c1c/1c8e1659/2198587170/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI0OCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-septeoq?refcode=20190926nd__248__&refcode2=express_lane_other")**
Not only does Mark have someone challenging him in 2020, but Mark's opponent is claiming his campaign is within **_" striking distance"_** of flipping the Senate seat next year.

Donald Trump is also investing heavily in Virginia and plans on campaigning here to turn our Commonwealth red.

**Make no mistake, we have a hard fight ahead of us in 2020 and Mark needs you standing beside him.**

Reaching our fundraising goal by the FEC reporting deadline is vital. **We must show Mark 's opponent and Donald Trump that beating Mark won't be an easy task -- _at all._**

**[Chip in now.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d0aa/53d9897e/52579c1c/1c8e1658/2198587170/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI0OCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-septeoq?refcode=20190926nd__248__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")**

Thanks for your support,

Jenny

name: SaraGideon.com
subject: September (Summary)
body:
First. Then. Now.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c50/4bef7a87/68958ef0/287f3c2a/2991472791/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friend, September was an exciting month for our campaign. Here's a quick rundown of what went down:
**FIRST** _NBC News_ labeled Maine one of the "most vulnerable GOP seats."
**THEN** We learned of another allegation against Brett Kavanaugh - who Susan Collins helped put on the Supreme Court.
**NOW** In exactly 5 days, we'll turn our fundraising report over to the FEC to be made public. We're asking for your help before this important deadline.
[**Make a contribution before our FEC deadline this Monday, September 30th. Help us finish this quarter strong.**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c50/4bef7a87/68958ef0/287f3c29/2991472791/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA5MjYtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-sept-deadline?refcode=em190926-2-full")
What many people don't realize is, this isn't just about how much money we raise.
We also have to report how many _individual supporters_ chipped in to support our campaign. That's important, because it's how we prove that Sara Gideon has the grassroots support she'll need to defeat Susan Collins.
[**That 's why we're hoping you can chip in - whatever amount you can afford - before our FEC deadline on Monday. **](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c50/4bef7a87/68958ef0/287f3c28/2991472791/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA5MjYtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-sept-deadline?refcode=em190926-2-full")
Thanks for sticking with us,
_Team Sara_

name: Joe Kennedy III
subject: Necessary and overdue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/page/m/3639109c/55b66746/2c56a42f/80ca550/2563211308/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | I've supported impeachment proceedings against Donald Trump for months - since reading the Mueller Report's detailed recap of his many attempts to obstruct a federal investigation. Now, as if that wasn't enough, he's trying to cover up his repeated efforts to force Ukraine to influence our election. **The impeachment inquiry is necessary.** I take no joy in this. All Americans - regardless of party or race or sexual orientation or religion or gender or age - are better off when the President of the United States _isn't_ suspected of breaking the law, when Congress can instead focus on enacting meaningful policy. **But it appears that the President did break the law - several laws, most likely - and Congress must hold him accountable.** This isn't about what's popular. It's not about pandering to one political base or frustrating another. It's not about what's convenient. It's not about winning elections. **It's about integrity and responsibility. It's about keeping our word and protecting our future. It's about doing what's right.** We can't preserve our principles by abandoning them when they're under attack or when political winds shift. In other words: if Donald Trump thinks the presidency puts him out of reach of the law, we must be willing to prove him wrong.**We must have the courage to prove that in the United States,_no one is above the law_.** It won't be easy, but standing together, we will restore our democracy, defeat Donald Trump, and continue building a progressive future for our country. As always, I'm proud to fight by your side, _Joe_ Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [$5](https://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/page/m/3639109c/55b66746/2c56a42f/80ca551/2563211308/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZiMjVsZlgwPSI6IjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=2019-09-26-impeachment&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$15](https://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/page/m/3639109c/55b66746/2c56a42f/80ca552/2563211308/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkSGR2ZlgwPSI6IjE1In0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=2019-09-26-impeachment&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$25](https://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/page/m/3639109c/55b66746/2c56a42f/80ca553/2563211308/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkR2h5WldWOWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=2019-09-26-impeachment&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$50](https://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/page/m/3639109c/55b66746/2c56a42f/80ca55c/2563211308/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZabTkxY24xOSI6IjUwIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=2019-09-26-impeachment&refcode2=express-buttons")

name: Senator Jeff Merkley
subject: The path to the Senate goes through Maine
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2d376/6cd27893/5183d3b1/15872a2f/527709422/VEsH/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "http://www.jeffmerkley.com")
---

| | One year ago, the Senate was in the middle of Brett Kavanaugh's confirmation hearing--and Christine Blasey Ford's heart wrenching testimony against him. The _New York Times_ recently uncovered yet another story of Kavanaugh's misconduct, reinforcing that Judge Kavanaugh has no place on the Supreme Court. And yet Kavanaugh was confirmed, thanks to a narrow Republican majority. One we must overcome in 2020 if we want to get our country back on track. That's why I'm supporting Maine's Speaker of the House, Sara Gideon, who is running for US Senate. She's a true progressive champion and we need her voice in the debate. [**Split a $3 donation between Sara Gideon's campaign in Maine and my reelection campaign today. This is important.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2d376/6cd27893/5183d3b1/15872a2c/527709422/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/merkley-gideon?refcode=2019-09-26-gideon&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") **Sara and I have an important FEC fundraising deadline coming up on September 30, so your donation couldn't come at a better time.** I know Sara has what it takes to win. Maine is one of the most flippable Senate seats in the country, and our path to the majority goes right through it. But it definitely won't be easy, and it's going to require all of us. [**So if you're ready to help take back the Senate, split a $3 donation today.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2d376/6cd27893/5183d3b1/15872a2c/527709422/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/merkley-gideon?refcode=2019-09-26-gideon&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") Onward! _Jeff _ Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Jeff Merkley and Sara Gideon instantly: | [$5](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2d376/6cd27893/5183d3b1/15872a2d/527709422/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZiMjVsZlgwPSI6IjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/merkley-gideon?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=2019-09-26-gideon&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$15](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2d376/6cd27893/5183d3b1/15872a2a/527709422/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkSGR2ZlgwPSI6IjE1In0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/merkley-gideon?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=2019-09-26-gideon&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$25](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2d376/6cd27893/5183d3b1/15872a2b/527709422/VEsA/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkR2h5WldWOWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/merkley-gideon?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=2019-09-26-gideon&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$50](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2d376/6cd27893/5183d3b1/15872a28/527709422/VEsB/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZabTkxY24xOSI6IjUwIn0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/merkley-gideon?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=2019-09-26-gideon&refcode2=express-buttons")

name: Team Cory
subject: If there was ever a time to make your first donation, it's right now team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Team, I'm sure you've heard by now, but our campaign is at a crossroads. We need to raise $1.7 million by September 30th or we will not be able to grow our operation fast enough to stay competitive. And on Monday, we learned that the DNC is increasing the donor threshold for the November debate to 165,000 individual donors -- meaning Cory is going to need more new donors like you to step up to make sure he's back on the debate stage. $1.7 million is a lot of money, make no mistake about it. But since then, thousands of people have stepped up. **We 've already raised $1,144,570.77.** Friend, a lot of people are still undecided in this race. According to an NBC/_Wall Street Journal_ national poll last week, **91% of Democratic primary voters have not made up their minds about which candidate they are supporting.** **[Here's the truth, it's completely all right to be undecided right now. Most people are! But if you believe that Cory brings a unique, important voice in this race, consider chipping in $3, $5, or whatever you can.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-q3eoq?refcode=em_fr_20190926_TC_20190926-fr-TC-tweets-ndnrs_ndnrs_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** In fact, many of our donations over the past few days are from people who aren't all in for any candidate yet: As Cory likes to say, democracy is not a spectator sport. If there was ever a time we needed you to get off the sidelines, this is it. **[All it takes to help out is a few dollars. Can we count on you to make your first donation right now?](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-q3eoq?refcode=em_fr_20190926_TC_20190926-fr-TC-tweets-ndnrs_ndnrs_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Thanks for stepping up when Cory needs it. Team Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-q3eoq?refcode=em_fr_20190926_TC_20190926-fr-TC-tweets-ndnrs_ndnrs_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
