This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ba8/5fca0d19/779bcef1/291f2012/2030418198/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ba8/5fca0d19/779bcef1/291f2011/2030418198/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ba8/5fca0d19/779bcef1/291f2010/2030418198/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ba8/5fca0d19/779bcef1/291f201f/2030418198/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ba8/5fca0d19/779bcef1/291f2013/2030418198/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: Dave Lindstrom
subject: Dems Are Starting Impeachment. Will you help stop it?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lindstrom for Senate
body:
I’m sure you’ve seen the news. Democrats are starting the impeachment process! For Kansans, President Trump has boosted the economy, reduced illegal

Peter,
I’m sure you’ve seen the news. Democrats are starting the impeachment process!

I have a plan to fight back, but I’ll need your help. Hello Peter, Before his presidency even began, Washington liberals were doing all they can to force Trump out of office. They’ve tried everything from twisting facts to creating bogus allegations. name: Wilmot Collins
subject: What's right isn't always popular
disclaimer_text: Paid for by A whole lot of folks for Wilmot Collins, PO Box 458, Helena, MT 59624
body:
After the shocking facts raised in the whistleblower complaint, I support a completely independent investigation of the facts contained in the complaint which means an impeachment inquiry by a co-equa
Today, I wanted to share with you this regarding impeachment --
After the shocking facts raised in the whistleblower complaint, I **support a completely independent investigation of the facts contained in the complaint which means an impeachment inquiry by a co-equal branch of government.**
I stand with you all as fellow Montanans who believe in America as a place where the rule of law still means something, and I stand with you as our great nation comes together to endure these struggles.
[I'm going to be honest with you about something else as well. There are going to be a lot of folks who disagree with me on this, and they're going to make this race even more difficult than it already is. If you stand with me, can you show it now by giving $20 or more to our third-quarter goal?](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/5616461a/1e3760f0/691e835a/5f7ef90e/3512373426/VEsH/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/1909-eoq-wc?refcode=190926-email-am&ampamount=20;recurring=auto")
We stand at a crossroads as a nation. We must walk together as one people, hand in hand, into the future. The next generations don't care what political party you are, they care that you're fighting for them. That's why as your next United States Senator, I will stand up for the rule of law, against corruption in all forms and fight my hardest to use all the powers of the Senate office to address climate change.
[We just can't trust Senator Daines to do that. He has proven time and time again that he will up his party interests and wealthy donors ahead of us -- the people. Stand with me now by helping me hit my third-quarter goal!](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/5616461a/1e3760f0/691e835a/5f7ef90e/3512373426/VEsE/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/1909-eoq-wc?refcode=190926-email-am&ampamount=20;recurring=auto")

Thank you for your support,
Wilmot Collins

name: Shad Murib, Team Hick
subject: Why we need to take back the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
With each and every day that Mitch McConnell is in charge of the Senate, we're moving backward--and Cory Gardner has been with him every step of the way. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714d1/691c9bd/6e298caf/11a7ad61/188678834/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-sep?refcode=em_template")
---
| Team, I'm Shad from the Hickenlooper campaign. I'm writing today because with our big fundraising deadline coming up, it's important to remember what exactly is at stake in this race.

With each and every day that Mitch McConnell is in charge of the Senate, we're moving backward--and Cory Gardner has been with him every step of the way.

**The power to end McConnell 's majority lies in our hands. This Senate seat is one of the most flippable of the 2020 cycle--**[**_but winning it means this team needs to show up at big moments, including our first quarterly fundraising deadline. Chip in today._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-sep?refcode=em_fr_20190926_SM_20190926-fr-SM-blocked-all_all_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

There's a reason they call the U.S. Senate Mitch McConnell's "legislative graveyard." Important bills on gun violence, election security, health care, and climate change--all passed by the House and waiting for Senate approval to head to the president's desk--are stuck in limbo, while McConnell fast-tracks Donald Trump's extreme judicial nominees to lifelong appointments across the country.

But rather than demand better and stand up for Coloradans. Cory Gardner has been a reliable rubber stamp for this destructive agenda.

We have to end McConnell's grip on power--and that starts with sweeping out yes-men like Gardner and taking back the Senate.

[**_John is ready to bring change to Washington, but getting there will take a full team effort. Can you make a donation now before our first FEC deadline?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-sep?refcode=em_fr_20190926_SM_20190926-fr-SM-blocked-all_all_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

Thank you,
Shad

Shad Murib
Hickenlooper for Colorado [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-sep?refcode=em_fr_20190926_SM_20190926-fr-SM-blocked-all_all_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
---

P.O. Box 18886, Denver, CO 80218
Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper for Colorado are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, you can join the Hickenlooper for Colorado team by **[_signing up right here_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714d1/691c9bd/6e298caf/11a7a29d/188678834/VEsD/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer")**.
Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714d1/691c9bd/6e298caf/11a7a29a/188678834/VEsA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714d1/691c9bd/6e298caf/11a7a29b/188678834/VEsB/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714d1/691c9bd/6e298caf/11a7a298/188678834/VEsO/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714d1/691c9bd/6e298caf/11a7a299/188678834/VEsP/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").
We love staying connected to you--and these emails are the best way to stay up to date with the latest on this campaign. But if at any point you'd like to stop receiving these messages, you can unsubscribe [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714d1/691c9bd/6e298caf/11a7a296/188678834/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").
If we're not reaching you at the correct email address, please update your information [_**here**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714d1/691c9bd/6e298caf/11a7a29d/188678834/VEsHBA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer").

name: staff@maggiehassan.com
subject: Q3 history for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: We need universal red flag laws
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, After senseless gun violence ripped apart communities across the country these past few months, the pressure is mounting for lawmakers across the country to pass meaningful gun control measures that will prevent further tragedies. Red flag laws allow family members and police to petition a state court to temporarily remove firearms and weapons from someone's possession if they are deemed a danger to themselves or others. Currently, only 17 states and the District of Columbia have laws like this, and we think they need to be nationwide. [**That 's why we're asking you to join us today in calling on lawmakers across the nation to pass red flag laws and protect our communities! We should not live in fear of guns any longer, and passing these laws would be a concrete step toward making that future a reality.**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd3f/6e9863e8/15115984/1db0d66d/3291788369/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.paction.us/fed-red-flag-law/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC") Thanks for standing with us, The WDTO Team [SIGN THE PETITION](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd3f/6e9863e8/15115984/1db0d66d/3291788369/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.paction.us/fed-red-flag-law/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC")
---

Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b498/18e32a7f/530771cc/7b0a33bd/1743160113/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b498/18e32a7f/530771cc/7b0a33b2/1743160113/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b498/18e32a7f/530771cc/7b0a33b3/1743160113/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

Did you see this recent headline from _SRQ Magazine 1_, friends?

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/adOWTXlqjoJd49qxI6wPCWVkYLfzRenzBrSf8sLx518=/kIJRkBfDxjgJnY6Vyyyh2WBaR7g2iTdOyaXCavjE3Sc=?refcode=em_fr_2019.09.26_b1_kmg_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)
Folks on both sides of the aisle know Margaret as a relentless advocate for Florida's middle-class families who doesn't let political affiliations or partisan differences stop her from getting things done for the people in her district.

She understands that the only way to make progress in divided government is by working together to find common ground and putting the common good first.

Friends, that's something we need more of in our nation's capital -- where partisan gridlock has deteriorated Congress's ability to deliver anything of substance to the American people.

**Margaret Good, in the US House, with her "fierce and friendly" brand of leadership, is EXACTLY what we need in this modern era of unprecedented political divisiveness. The first step to getting her to Congress, though, is meeting our first fundraising goal!

[We have 3 more days before our end of quarter deadline and we need to raise $18,693 before our numbers are released to the public. name: Pat Christofolo
subject: Saturday's event at the Farm at South Mountain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
Dear Friend,

As the owner and head chef at the Farm at South Mountain, I am excited to be hosting Saturday's fundraiser in support of Congressman Greg Stanton's re-election campaign.

Congressman Greg Stanton represents our Arizona values in Washington and he is counting on our support in his campaign.

**I hope you will join me and other supporters for hors d 'oeuvres and refreshments ****at Saturday 's fundraiser from 5:30 - 7:30pm at the Farm.**

[_**Please RSVP today if you plan to attend »**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/OpRmbmpSBb7gn4w1CkQFGt2UEMpkBPnAr_Z-n5CqvYA=/JWiU2Ol_Cxgq9WieJtMnYwEY7edeJqgF-Gw5nUZxQHs=)

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Jaime Harrison could turn the Senate blue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek,

If we are going to take back the Senate next year -- and I believe that we can -- Jaime Harrison is going to be a big part of getting us there. [**So I'm asking you directly: Can you please chip in $10 or more to help Jaime in his fight to flip a Senate seat in 2020?**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f176b/3e0906/78fbd9ee/3e30fd19/3143028908/VEsH/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-jh?express_lane=true&refcode=20190926_3_FR_TK_JH&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+So+Im+asking+you+directly+Can+you+please&utm_campaign=20190926_3_FR_TK_JH&source=20190926_3_FR_TK_JH") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**DONATE $10**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f176b/3e0906/78fbd9ee/3e30fd18/3143028908/VEsE/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-jh?express_lane=&amount=10&refcode=20190926_3_FR_TK_JH&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=20190926_3_FR_TK_JH&source=20190926_3_FR_TK_JH")
---
| [**DONATE $20**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f176b/3e0906/78fbd9ee/3e30fd1f/3143028908/VEsF/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-jh?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=20190926_3_FR_TK_JH&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+DONATE+20&utm_campaign=20190926_3_FR_TK_JH&source=20190926_3_FR_TK_JH")
---
| [**DONATE $50**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f176b/3e0906/78fbd9ee/3e30fd1e/3143028908/VEsC/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-jh?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=20190926_3_FR_TK_JH_50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=20190926_3_FR_TK_JH&source=20190926_3_FR_TK_JH")
---
| [**OTHER**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f176b/3e0906/78fbd9ee/3e30fd1d/3143028908/VEsD/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-jh?express_lane=true&refcode=20190926_2_FR_TK_JH&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+OTHER&utm_campaign=20190926_3_FR_TK_JH&source=20190926_3_FR_TK_JH")
---
I don't have to tell you that the Senate would be a more productive, less partisan place with more Democrats in it. But what you might not know is just how much Jaime's presence in the halls of the Capitol would mean for us.
Jaime grew up in Orangeburg, South Carolina in poverty, living in a tiny house where he was raised by his grandparents. Through hard work and determination, he earned a scholarship to Yale and Georgetown Law. He has said many times -- and I agree -- that _what you say matters, and character counts. _Jaime has character, and we sure could use him here in the Senate.
Derek, the Senate would be a better place with Jaime Harrison in it, and his victory would go a long way toward securing a Democratic majority in 2020. But it won't come without a fight. The NRSC and its army of special interest donors will blanket the airwaves with negative and false attacks.
**Can you step up and chip in to help Jaime in his bid for the U.S. Senate? **
******[**DONATE**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f176b/3e0906/78fbd9ee/3e30fd1c/3143028908/VEsA/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-jh?express_lane=true&refcode=20190926_3_FR_TK_JH&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=6+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20190926_3_FR_TK_JH&source=20190926_3_FR_TK_JH")******
---
Thank you for all you're doing,
-Tim Kaine

* * *
|

name: grassroots@andybeshear.com
subject: can't be bought
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019
body:
We knew all along that Matt Bevin's backers would pull out all the stops to get him reelected. And we were right.
|
---

| | | More than $4.2 million has been spent by outside groups against Andy

**[Pitch in now to help us fight back](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a40/ad6dc73/14118717/db78c7b/485271700/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI5NSJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-bevinbackers?refcode=20190926.2nd__295__&amount=5")**
---

We knew all along that Matt Bevin's backers would pull out all the stops to get him reelected. And we were right.

Matt Bevin is the most unpopular governor in the country but that's not stopping out-of-state interests from doing everything they can to keep him in office. A shady right-wing group just dumped a quarter of a million dollars into a digital buy -- and that's on top of the millions being spent on TV by his D.C. cronies.

We're relying on our grassroots team, not big outside spending. **We need your help. Every single donation gets us so much closer to winning this race in November. Rush a donation now!**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
**[DONATE $5](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a40/ad6dc73/14118717/db78c78/485271700/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI5NSJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-bevinbackers?express_lane=true&refcode=20190926.2nd__295__&amount=5")**

**[DONATE $50](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a40/ad6dc73/14118717/db78c7f/485271700/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI5NSJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-bevinbackers?express_lane=true&refcode=20190926.2nd__295__&amount=50")**
**[DONATE $100](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a40/ad6dc73/14118717/db78c7c/485271700/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI5NSJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-bevinbackers?express_lane=true&refcode=20190926.2nd__295__&amount=100")**
**[CHOOSE AN AMOUNT](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a40/ad6dc73/14118717/db78c7d/485271700/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI5NSJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-bevinbackers?refcode=20190926.2nd__295__")**
With your support, we can win this campaign and send a huge message that Kentucky can't be bought. It means protecting access to health care and standing up for public education. It's why the other side is pouring so much money into this race.

Bevin and his cronies are doing everything they can to distract from his record and buy his way into another term. **[Help stop them. Every dollar matters.](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a40/ad6dc73/14118717/db78c7b/485271700/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI5NSJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-bevinbackers?refcode=20190926.2nd__295__&amount=5")**

Team Beshear

name: Dick Durbin
subject: President Trump attacked me from the UN
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
Peter,
Yesterday, President Trump held a press conference at the UN...and called out Senators Bob Menendez, Patrick Leahy, and myself in an attempt to distract from his actions regarding Ukraine.
**[I need you to show you're standing with me. Add your name now to tell President Trump to drop his false and inappropriate attacks. ](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4c04/42ab3cf4/61fcf383/135d4480/1016748972/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/send-a-message-to-president-trump?source=em190926&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
Here is the truth: Back in 2018, there were reports that Ukraine was considering refusing to cooperate with the Mueller investigation -- an official investigation conducted by the United States -- out of concern that President Trump would cut off aid as punishment. So in May 2018, Senators Menendez, Leahy, and I sent a _public_ letter expressing our concerns on this matter to Ukraine's Prosecutor General.
As it turns out, we were even more right than we knew to worry that President Trump would try to use aid to Ukraine as leverage for his political agenda.
**[We cannot allow President Trump to deflect and distract from his abuse of power. Add your name now to tell President Trump to drop his false and inappropriate attacks.](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4c04/42ab3cf4/61fcf383/135d4480/1016748972/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/send-a-message-to-president-trump?source=em190926&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
Thank you for standing with me.
My best,
Dick Durbin
**[Add My Name](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4c04/42ab3cf4/61fcf383/135d4480/1016748972/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/send-a-message-to-president-trump?source=em190926&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**

* * *
Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Should you want to unsubscribe, you can [click here](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4c04/42ab3cf4/61fcf383/135d4481/1016748972/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Join Senator Durbin in taking on powerful special interests on behalf of hard-working middle class families by [making a contribution to our campaign here.](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4c04/42ab3cf4/61fcf383/135d4482/1016748972/VEsD/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/durbin_footer")

Chicago, IL 60654

"" Here is the truth: Back in 2018, there were reports that Ukraine was considering refusing to cooperate with the Mueller investigation -- an official investigation conducted by the United States -- out of concern that President Trump would cut off aid as punishment. So in May 2018, Senators Menendez, Leahy, and I sent a public letter expressing our concerns on this matter to Ukraine's Prosecutor General. As it turns out, we were even more right than we knew to worry that President Trump would try to use aid to Ukraine as leverage for his political agenda. "" Thank you for standing with me. My best, Dick Durbin "" * Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin

---
[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U2164LbVVIXSC8SRdPUkPdQc-sU6tLMdh2szY6Q3NMVyCArarwEaE6Fcyi6lkbCT1OU&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190926_fr&n=1) Team —**President Trump pressured Ukraine to investigate a political opponent. When he got caught, here’s how his campaign responded:** [****](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U2164LbVVIXSC8SRdPUkPdQc-sU6tLMdh2szY6Q3NMVyCArarwEaE6Fcyi6lkbCT1OU&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190926_fr&n=2) Well we read President Trump’s memorandum of conversation with the President of Ukraine (_note: it’s definitely not a transcript_), and**here’s the gist of how that conversation went from Trump’s side:**
* The United States does a lot for Ukraine
* Ukraine is not doing enough for me
* We’d love to sell you weapons and release your foreign aid, but first I have a favor to ask
* Investigate my main Democratic rival over a scandal I invented
* My personal lawyer and the US Attorney General will be in touch to check on your progress

Now you tell me. **Is this the kind of behavior that we should tolerate from the President of the United States?** Enough is enough. Our country is on a precipice, and the only way to save our Republic is to reclaim the Republican Party back from the autocrats who scoff at the law and attack anyone prioritizing transparency and accountability. [**Can you help us fight back by making a $20.20 donation right now?**](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U2164LbVVIXSC8SRdPUkPdQc-sU6tLMdh2szY6Q3NMVyCArarwEaE6Fcyi6lkbCT1OU&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190926_fr&n=3) Your continued support is everything, and our campaign can’t succeed without your efforts and dedication. Thank you for all that you do. — Bill | | [DONATE ⇒](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U2164LbVVIXSC8SRdPUkPdQc-sU6tLMdh2szY6Q3NMVyCArarwEaE6Fcyi6lkbCT1OU&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190926_fr&n=4)
---
Paid for by Weld 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190926_fr&n=5).

Created with [NationBuilder](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190926_fr&n=8), software for leaders.

name: Team Hick
subject: Gardner and Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
While Gardner gets ready to schmooze with Trump and his allies, we're going to be sprinting to meet our goals before Monday's deadline with the help of people like you. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714d7/691c9bd/6e2a1159/11a7a23b/916449657/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-sep?refcode=em_template")
---
| Team, next week Cory Gardner heads to a three-day fundraiser for Donald Trump.

That's an awful lot of time to spend rubbing elbows with wealthy donors and special interests in support of a president that the vast majority of Coloradans disapprove of. But while Gardner's hobnobbing with his fellow Trump supporters, we're keeping our eye on the prize here in Colorado: winning this Senate seat.

**Monday marks our first FEC filing deadline of this campaign. On that report, we 'll be showing everyone not only how much we've raised, but how different our team looks from Gardner's.**

We're not taking a dime from corporate PACs. We're depending on a grassroots team made up of people from across Colorado--teachers, park rangers, small business owners, folks who go to work every day to make our communities a better place. These people deserve another great voice advocating for them in the U.S. Senate.

While Gardner gets ready to schmooze with Trump and his allies, we're going to be sprinting to meet our goals before Monday's deadline with the help of people like you. [**_Now 's your chance to be on the record as an early supporter of this campaign--chip in now before our deadline._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-sep?refcode=em_fr_20190926_TH_20190926-fr-TH-corytrump-all_ndnr_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

Thank you,
Team Hick [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-sep?refcode=em_fr_20190926_TH_20190926-fr-TH-corytrump-all_all_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
---

P.O. Box 18886, Denver, CO 80218
Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper for Colorado are not tax deductible.

Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714d7/691c9bd/6e2a1159/11a7a234/916449657/VEsA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714d7/691c9bd/6e2a1159/11a7a235/916449657/VEsB/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714d7/691c9bd/6e2a1159/11a7a232/916449657/VEsO/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714d7/691c9bd/6e2a1159/11a7a233/916449657/VEsP/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").
We love staying connected to you--and these emails are the best way to stay up to date with the latest on this campaign. But if at any point you'd like to stop receiving these messages, you can unsubscribe [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714d7/691c9bd/6e2a1159/11a7a230/916449657/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

name: SaraGideon.com
subject: Republicans are nervous. They should be.
body:
Hey, they're not wrong!
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c55/4bef7a87/6b68e4d1/287f3d38/1561964377/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends,
We'll give credit where it's due. This GOP official said it best:
**_" It's hard to see how we hold the Senate without Maine." _**
We couldn't agree more! Democrats' path to taking back the Senate cuts right through Maine - and victory is within reach.
Susan Collins' approval rating has fallen _44 points_ since 2017, the biggest drop of anyone in the Senate. She's the second most unpopular Senator in the country, just behind Mitch McConnell.
**Republicans are nervous. They should be. Sara Gideon can win - but she can't do it alone, so we have to ask:**
[**Can you make a $3 contribution before our FEC deadline on September 30th? We 're not taking any money from corporate PACs, so your contribution goes a very long way towards helping us win.**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c55/4bef7a87/6b68e4d1/287f3d3f/1561964377/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA5MjYtMy1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-sept-deadline?refcode=em190926-3-full")
When Sara Gideon wins this race, it will be entirely because supporters like you believed in our campaign from the very beginning. Thank you for being there.
All our best,
\- Team Sara
****[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c55/4bef7a87/6b68e4d1/287f3d3f/1561964377/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA5MjYtMy1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-sept-deadline?refcode=em190926-3-full")****

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c55/4bef7a87/6b68e4d1/287f3d3e/1561964377/VEsC/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c55/4bef7a87/6b68e4d1/287f3d3d/1561964377/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

body:
The biggest deadline of our campaign is right around the corner.
|
---

| | | | **FEC DEADLINE: 4 DAYS**
This is our first challenge since Trump's hand-picked candidate finally announced he's running against James. | | | [CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa223/18d6a294/4cfbf2e6/26d644af/2165543377/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUxOTA5MjZuZCIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0%3D/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme190926nd?refcode=jme190926nd_m&recurring=true")
---
Friend--Trump's handpicked candidate finally announced this month that he's running against me, dramatically changing the dynamics of this race.
But here's something we need to change: We're not on track to reach our FEC fundraising goal.
**So I 'm going to be direct.** I'm asking you to contribute $3 to my campaign, so we can finish the quarter strong and ramp up our efforts across the state. **Give $3 by clicking here:[_jamesmackler.com/FECGoalSept19._](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa223/18d6a294/4cfbf2e6/26d644ac/2165543377/VEsF/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme190926nd?refcode=jme190926nd_m&recurring=true")**
All across Tennessee, people are fed up with the dysfunction in Washington. They want new, reliable, and courageous leadership--not a rubber stamp for the president.
There is so much at stake, so we need to keep our heads down and get to work.
I need your help. name: Team Ed Markey
subject: SIGN ON: Fight for the truth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| |
---
| Team: Since impeachment proceedings were announced, Donald Trump has already done everything in his power to attack Democrats.

_**[Donald Trump must be impeached and held accountable, and we need to stand with Democrats to show our support. Will you add your name today and show you support House Democrats' impeachment proceedings to hold Donald Trump accountable?](http://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dcf2/693b8b0a/44bfddfd/72de68bf/2118751786/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/demand-impeachment?source=EM-092619_3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=")**_

Begin Forward from Ed Markey:
* * *
> Team,
>
> Donald Trump violated his oath of office.
>
> By seeking foreign help to smear a political rival and influence our elections, he continues to tear at the fabric of our democracy every day.
>
> And now, with the released "transcript" of Donald Trump's call with Ukrainian President Zelensky, the evidence of Trump's wrongdoing is clear.
>
> And equally disturbing, the "transcript" also shows that Donald Trump is using the Justice Department as a weapon to go after his rival.
>
> All that we have learned shows that Trump committed impeachable offenses.
>
> House Democrats are doing their constitutional duty to impeach Donald Trump, and they need to know that we're standing with them ready to fight for the truth.
>
> _**[Will you add your name next to mine and show you support House Democrats' impeachment to hold Donald Trump accountable?](http://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dcf2/693b8b0a/44bfddfd/72de68bf/2118751786/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/demand-impeachment?source=EM-092619_3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=")**_
>
> Thanks,
>
> Ed Markey

---

| | Paid for by The Markey Committee
---

clean_body: | | | Team: Since impeachment proceedings were announced, Donald Trump has already done everything in his power to attack Democrats. "=" Begin Forward from Ed Markey: Team, Donald Trump violated his oath of office. By seeking foreign help to smear a political rival and influence our elections, he continues to tear at the fabric of our democracy every day. And now, with the released "transcript" of Donald Trump's call with Ukrainian President Zelensky, the evidence of Trump's wrongdoing is clear. And equally disturbing, the "transcript" also shows that Donald Trump is using the Justice Department as a weapon to go after his rival. All that we have learned shows that Trump committed impeachable offenses. House Democrats are doing their constitutional duty to impeach Donald Trump, and they need to know that we're standing with them ready to fight for the truth. "="** Thanks, Ed Markey | | Paid for by The Markey Committee Contributions or gifts to The Markey Committee are not tax deductible.

A personal message from Dr. Michael E. Mann, Climate Scientist and recipient of the 2019 Tyler Prize for Environmental Achievement
---
| | [](https://secure.314action.%3D%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_monthly_incumbentdefenseeoq?refcode=314_EM_FR_190926_Mann_U2_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_190926_Mann_U2_X1&source=314_EM_FR_190926_Mann_U2_X1") I've spent my career sounding the alarm on climate change -- Republicans have tried to intimidate me into silence every step of the way. **I 've faced hostile investigations, personal attacks, demands for me to be fired, death threats, and even threats against my family.** But threats don't change the facts: Climate change is real, man-made, and getting worse every day that we fail to act. Scientists are under attack in our country. [**That 's why I'm asking you directly -- Will you make a donation to help elect Democratic scientists to Congress before 314 Action's quarterly fundraising deadline?**](https://secure.314action.%3D%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_monthly_incumbentdefenseeoq?refcode=314_EM_FR_190926_Mann_U2_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=2+-+Thatrsquos+why+Irsquom+asking+you+direct&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_190926_Mann_U2_X1&source=314_EM_FR_190926_Mann_U2_X1") | | | [Chip in $31.41 ->](https://secure.314action.%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_monthly_incumbentdefenseeoq?refcode=314_EM_FR_190926_Mann_U2_X1&amount=31.41&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=3+-+Chip+in+3141+rarr&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_190926_Mann_U2_X1&source=314_EM_FR_190926_Mann_U2_X1")

314 Action is a grassroots community of nearly 1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.
If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can [click here to make a donation.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb478f/4bd7760e/431fe5ab/77e0bbdc/717454379/VEsHDA/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_footer?refcode=emailfooter&amount=31.41&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=19+-+click+here+to+make+a+donation&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_190926_Mann_U2_X1&source=314_EM_FR_190926_Mann_U2_X1")
We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb478f/4bd7760e/431fe5ab/77e0bbdb/717454379/VEsEBQ/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/less-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=20+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_190926_Mann_U2_X1&source=314_EM_FR_190926_Mann_U2_X1")

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: Need your input:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
Take the Off the Sidelines survey

| | [](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjIxNjk1NTIS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTU4MTU5NTUwOAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
|
---
| Peter,

Last week, I announced that I was re-launching my Off the Sidelines PAC with a commitment to raise $1 million for women candidates in 2020.

It's a big goal, but one I know we can accomplish together. You see, Off the Sidelines is a movement that works _because_ of activists like you. Your stories keep us focused, inspired, and ready to fight.

**So I want to hear from you: What are your priorities heading into the 2020 election? Please, share your thoughts by taking our quick Off the Sidelines survey:******
---
| | [TAKE THE SURVEY](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjIxNjk1NTIS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTU4MTU5NTUwOAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
|
Eight years ago, I started Off the Sidelines as a call to action: I told women and girls that if they raised their voices on the issues that mattered most to them, they could change the world.

Since then, a lot _has_ changed. In 2016, we put over 60 million cracks in the highest, toughest glass ceiling. We've marched. We've organized. We've fought for equal pay (on and off the field) and for access to safe and affordable health care. 2018 saw a record number of women run for office--and win.

We can do it again in 2020 by building a strong, community-led movement that lifts up women's voices and gives them the resources they need to run for office and win. Will you share your thoughts on where we should focus our efforts?

[**You can take the survey HERE.**](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjIxNjk1NTIS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTU4MTU5NTUwOAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

With gratitude,
Kirsten
---
| | Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
---
| _Contributions or gifts to Off the Sidelines PAC are not tax-deductible. Off the Sidelines PAC does not accept contributions from federal lobbyists, corporate and/or trade association PACs, or "for profit" business entities, including but not limited to sole proprietorships, partnerships, and LLCs._

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving messages from Kirsten altogether, [click here to unsubscribe](https://www.pages05.net/gfppcinc/unsubscribe/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=22169552&spUserID=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&spJobID=MTU4MTU5NTUwOAS2&spReportId=MTU4MTU5NTUwOAS2).
---
